creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Wed, 10 Oct 2001 17:41:47 +0200 (CEST),
Pascal Hofstee wrote:
> 	There exists a "circular" dependency between the gettext and gettext-devel
> 	ports. The gettext-devel port requires bison to build, which in turn
> 	requires libintl to build. Which will result in installing BOTH gettext AND
> 	gettext-devel ports whith the gettext-devel port basically overwriting a
> 	lot of files from the gettext port.

The gettext-devel/pkg-plist file is a dummy actually.  It produces a
proper pkg-plist on the spot.

> >How-To-Repeat:
> 	Try to build gettext-devel port without libintl currently available.

And you can see the gettext-devel port doesn't overwrite anything.


Maxim, I'd suggest you change pkg-plist to avoid causing such
misunderstandings, e.g.:

echo '@comment The pkg-plist for this port is dynamically generated.' > pkg-plist
